arts.ttl: 'Astounding' - What Bristol City and Liam Manning can expect from Sunderland and Regis Le Bris - Bristol Live
arts.sum: Having produced one of their worst performances of the season so far against Portsmouth last time out, Bristol City travel to the Stadium of Light on Tuesday to face Sunderland in search of a reaction. Sunderland are yet to lose at home so far this term and, while Le Bris' men have struggled to turn draws into wins in recent weeks, they got back to winning ways with a late 2-1 win over Stoke City on Saturday afternoon to end a six-game winless run.

arts.ttl: Bristol City disciplinary latest ahead of Sunderland clash as trio have suspension fears eased
arts.sum: So far this term, the Robins have seen both Mark Sykes and Joe Williams miss matches having reached the threshold of five yellow cards which warrants a one-game suspension in the Championship. Bristol City have managed to avoid losing another player to suspension for picking up five bookings already this season ahead of their clash with Sunderland at the Stadium of Light on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Zak Vyner sets Bristol City teammates challenge ahead of Sunderland after Portsmouth defeat
arts.sum: Zak Vyner has challenged himself and his Bristol City teammates to dust themselves down and return to winning ways when they travel to the Stadium of Light to face Sunderland on Tuesday evening. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Jon Harley explains Portsmouth disappointment after dominant Fratton Park win over Bristol City
arts.sum: Portsmouth coach Jon Harley admitted his side were disappointed to only be leading Bristol City by a single goal at half-time having dominated the opening 45 minutes against the Robins. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sunderland vs. Bristol City - prediction, team news, lineups
